text.title: Retainer Renewal Decision Tree
text.summary: Tree mapping (margin, utilisation, NPS, strategic_fit) tuple to keep / upsell / renegotiate / kill.

decision-tree.root-question: all four inputs (margin, utilisation, nps, strategic_fit) populated AND non-tbd?

conclusion.verdict: defer; collect inputs first; do NOT decide on partial data
publish numeric thresholds before applying; reject vague labels
renegotiate: keep relationship, raise rate / cut scope to restore margin
kill: end retainer at next renewal; document evidence + sign
upsell: client absorbing more capacity than capped; price next tier
keep: cite all four inputs passing thresholds + evidence anchor; sign record

text.example: margin=12 < min=25 → strategic_fit=3 >= min=3 → renegotiate; raise rate or cut scope.
